title: hippomarathrum brachylobum
intro: Hippomarathrum brachylobum is a plant species, also known as Mountain Sneezeweed, which belongs to the Apiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and antitussive effects, helping to relieve coughs and congestion. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, ease respiratory issues, and promote a healthy immune system. Hippomarathrum brachylobum is often prepared as an herbal infusion or tincture, although specific herbal preparations may vary depending on the intended use and available information.
